execution_summary: The Docker environment was generated with fixed dependency versions resolving NumPy–Statsmodels binary compatibility. A Python entrypoint (main.py) was created as orchestrator expected. The logistic regression with cluster-robust SEs ran on the replication dataset, produced coefficients and saved them to replication_coefficients.csv, aligning with preregistered plan.

code_executed.logs: GLM fitted. Key coefficients printed. File replication_coefficients.csv created.

results.hypothesis_tested: Mortality salience (death prime) lowers utilitarian acceptability compared with pain control.

findings_summary.outcome_name: Coefficient salience_fact[T.pain] (pain vs death) on conflict scenario baseline

tables.table_description: Full coefficient table saved from statsmodels
